data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Birthday/anniversary automatic discounts', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for such discounts, there is no evidence demonstrating their implementation or validation, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the absence of any evidence related to the automatic issuance of discounts on birthdays or anniversaries indicates that this requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of birthday/anniversary automatic discounts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the birthday/anniversary discount requirement.
